sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Nocera to implement 1-for-30 reverse stock split By Investing.com
feed.summary: Nocera, Inc. (NASDAQ:NCRA) has announced a 1-for-30 reverse stock split to increase its per-share trading price and maintain its listing on The Nasdaq Capital Market. The move follows a significant decline in the stock's value over the past year. This decision is part of Nocera's broader strategy to transform into a diversified technology-focused holding company, with recent investments in AI and plans to establish a venture platform for technology companies.

feed.title: Why Boeing (BA) Stock Is Trading Up Today
feed.summary: Shares of Boeing (BA) rose 2.7% after a mixed bag of news including a positive sale-and-lease-back transaction for two 787-9 aircraft balanced by a new FAA safety directive for the 737 MAX concerning an electrical fault. The stock's modest gain contributed to a broader market rally, with shares trading at $224.48. The article also notes the distinction between commercial aerospace and defense segments, highlighting how falling oil prices positively impact airline profitability and thus commercial aircraft orders.

feed.title: Travelers launches proprietary LLM tailored to property casualty business
feed.summary: Travelers has developed TravelersLLM, a proprietary large language model specifically designed for its property and casualty insurance business. This LLM was trained on millions of internal company documents and built by Travelers' own engineers and data scientists. TravelersLLM aims to enhance underwriting analysis, accelerate research, and improve workflows by leveraging decades of institutional knowledge, and has reportedly outperformed commercially available AI models in tests.

feed.title: Medtronic starts to notify people affected by cyberattack
feed.summary: Medtronic has begun notifying individuals potentially affected by a cyberattack disclosed over two months ago, offering complimentary credit monitoring and identity theft services. The company states there is no evidence the accessed data has been publicly posted, and no impact on product security or patient safety has been identified. This incident follows a string of cyberattacks on other medtech companies, including Stryker, Intuitive Surgical, and iRhythm, highlighting an ongoing industry-wide vulnerability.

feed.title: Caterpillar Invests in the Future of Texas' Manufacturing Workforce
feed.summary: Caterpillar Inc. has launched a workforce commitment in Texas with an initial allocation of up to $5 million, as part of its five-year, $100 million Building the Future Workforce Initiative. This investment aims to prepare current and future workers in Texas for careers in advanced manufacturing and industry technician roles. Texas was chosen due to Caterpillar's significant presence there and the state's strong manufacturing infrastructure and educational institutions.

feed.title: National Fuel Gas Co highlights integrated energy model as investors eye long-term stability
feed.summary: National Fuel Gas Co (NFG) presents a diversified energy profile by combining regulated natural gas distribution with exploration and pipeline assets. This integrated model offers investors stable cash flows from regulated utilities and infrastructure, balanced with growth potential and volatility from commodity-linked exploration and production activities. The company's focus on long-term infrastructure investment and its ability to adapt capital allocation across segments make it appealing to those seeking stability and flexibility in the energy sector.

feed.title: Nano-X Imaging Ltd. (NNOX) Shareholders Who Lost Money Have Opportunity to Lead Securities Fraud Lawsuit
feed.summary: Glancy Prongay Wolke & Rotter LLP has announced a securities fraud class action lawsuit against Nano-X Imaging Ltd. (NNOX). The lawsuit alleges that Nano-X overstated efficiency gains and product demand, while their production was poorly aligned with demand, leading to increased operating expenses and cash burn. Investors who suffered losses between March 31, 2025, and April 17, 2026, have until August 11, 2026, to apply to be a lead plaintiff.

feed.title: Caterpillar puts up to $5M into Texas manufacturing jobs training
feed.summary: Caterpillar is investing up to $5 million in Texas as part of its $100 million "Building the Future Workforce Initiative" to prepare workers for advanced manufacturing and industry technician roles. The decision to focus on Texas is due to Caterpillar's significant presence there, including 6,630 employees and 17 facilities, along with the state's strong educational infrastructure. The initiative aims to reduce training barriers, define future-ready skills, and connect individuals to careers in collaboration with partners like Texas State Technical College and the Manufacturing Institute.

feed.title: IP, Ineos Styrolution, Smurfit Westrock to shutter plants
feed.summary: Multiple manufacturers in the packaging industry, including Ineos Styrolution, International Paper, and Smurfit Westrock, announced plant closures in June 2026, impacting over 480 workers. Ineos Styrolution is closing its polystyrene production site in Channahon, Illinois, affecting about 100 employees, citing margin pressures. International Paper will close four facilities in Illinois, California, New Jersey, and Kentucky, affecting a total of 330 workers, while Smurfit Westrock is closing a folding carton facility in Lebanon, Tennessee, impacting 52 employees.

feed.title: DOW Maintained by Alembic Global -- Price Target Lowered to $45.
feed.summary: Alembic Global has maintained an "Overweight" rating for Dow Inc (DOW) but lowered its price target from $50.00 to $45.00, reflecting a cautious outlook despite the stock appearing 30.7% undervalued according to GF Value™. DOW's GF Score™ is 56/100, indicating moderate potential for long-term returns, with profitability being a strength and momentum a weakness. Investors are advised to proceed with caution due to the mixed signals and absence of recent insider trading activity.

feed.title: General Mills Beats, But 'Less Bad' Outlook Leaves Analyst Unimpressed
feed.summary: General Mills (NYSE: GIS) beat its fourth-quarter earnings estimates but provided a "less bad" fiscal 2027 outlook, leaving TD Cowen analyst Robert Moskow unimpressed due to concerns over weak organic sales growth visibility. Moskow reiterated a Hold rating, raising the price target slightly to $32, while highlighting the company's strategic pivot to value growth and planned cost savings. Despite the announced initiatives, the analyst expressed a broader concern about the structural decline in "Big Food."

feed.title: FactSet Research Systems: Rising AI Adoption Bodes Well for Subscription Value Growth, Says Analyst
feed.summary: RBC Capital Markets analyst Ashish Sabadra reiterated a Sector Perform rating for FactSet Research Systems (NYSE: FDS) with a price target of $240, after the company reported strong third-quarter organic annual subscription value (ASV) growth, exceeding consensus expectations. The analyst highlighted significant AI monetization, with AI products contributing to ASV growth and increasing adoption among top clients. Sabadra also noted a positive outlook for the company's fourth-quarter performance and anticipates a meaningful margin recovery.

feed.title: AngloGold Ashanti vs. Newmont: Which Gold Mining Stock Is a Better Buy in 2026?
feed.summary: This article compares AngloGold Ashanti and Newmont, two major gold mining stocks, to determine which is a better investment in 2026. It analyzes their financial performance in fiscal year 2025, risk profiles, and valuations, concluding that AngloGold Ashanti is the better buy due to its higher growth potential and significantly better dividend yield, despite Newmont's larger scale and stability.

feed.title: Live Nation Entertainment focuses on live events as investors track concert demand
feed.summary: Live Nation Entertainment (LYV) remains a key player in the global live events industry, with investors closely monitoring its concert and ticketing activities as indicators of broader entertainment spending. The company's core business involves organizing and promoting concerts and festivals, managing venues, and operating digital ticketing platforms. Its revenue streams are diversified through concert promotion, ticketing sales, and sponsorship deals, making its performance sensitive to consumer spending habits and broader economic conditions.

feed.title: Top 5 Real Estate and Realty Stocks to Invest In According to Hedge Funds
feed.summary: This article identifies the top 5 real estate and realty stocks favored by hedge funds, providing a glimpse into their investment strategies. It highlights Mid-America Apartment Communities, Inc. (NYSE:MAA) as a key player, detailing its operational performance, development focus, and use of AI in its management platform. The piece offers a preview of a more extensive list and discusses notable performance metrics and strategic initiatives for the featured stock.

feed.title: Pentair plc focuses on water solutions as a diversified industrial player
feed.summary: Pentair plc is a diversified industrial company that specializes in water and fluid management technologies for residential, commercial, and industrial applications. The company's strategy involves focusing on water and fluid management, investing in innovation, and targeting high-margin, technology-driven solutions, all supported by long-term demands for water infrastructure, sustainability, and recurring aftermarket needs. Pentair's shares are listed on a major stock exchange, attracting investors interested in industrial and water infrastructure themes, with performance reflecting financial fundamentals and broader market conditions.

feed.title: Intellia Therapeutics (NTLA) Is Up 11.2% After Lonvo-z Phase 3 Progress And 2027 Launch Plans - Has The Bull Case Changed?
feed.summary: Intellia Therapeutics (NTLA) saw an 11.2% stock price increase following positive Phase 3 results for its ATTR therapy, Lonvo-z, and plans for a 2027 U.S. launch. This clinical progress is critical for the gene-editing company, which faces high short interest and concerns regarding valuation, funding needs, and commercial readiness. The success provides a clearer regulatory path and concrete timing for Lonvo-z, potentially easing development risk while investors remain aware of ongoing cash burn and potential dilution.

feed.title: Darden Restaurants steadies operations as US dining sector evolves
feed.summary: Darden Restaurants, a major player in the US full-service dining sector, is focusing on consistent execution, cost control, and portfolio strength to adapt to changing consumer behaviors. The company operates a diverse portfolio of casual and fine dining brands, emphasizing reliable service and menu quality. Its strategy involves managing operating scale, optimizing brand mix, and disciplined capital allocation to navigate market dynamics and maintain long-term stability.

feed.title: Fortive Corp. focuses on industrial technology growth as investors weigh long-term opportunities
feed.summary: Fortive Corp. is strategically building its portfolio of industrial and professional instrumentation businesses, emphasizing recurring revenue streams from software and services to support margins and growth. The company diversifies across various end markets and uses acquisitions to focus on high-growth, high-margin areas. Investors are watching how Fortive balances cyclical exposure with recurring revenue, portfolio optimization, and cash generation.

feed.title: O’Reilly Automotive, Inc. announces dates for second quarter 2026 earnings release and conference call
feed.summary: O’Reilly Automotive, Inc. has announced that its second quarter 2026 financial results will be released after 3:30 p.m. Central Time on Wednesday, July 29, 2026. A conference call for investors and analysts to discuss these results will follow on Thursday, July 30, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Central Time. The company, founded in 1957, is a major retailer of automotive aftermarket parts with 6,644 stores across various regions as of March 31, 2026.

feed.title: Jacobs Solutions holds steady after a thin news day. Investors still have a US-listed engineering an
feed.summary: Jacobs Solutions (US4698141098), a large-cap US engineering and consulting firm, continues to draw investor attention due to its focus on backlog, margins, and execution. The company operates in infrastructure, advanced facilities, and technical consulting, trading on the NYSE. Analysts and investors closely monitor its contract wins, project mix, and client spending durability to assess earnings quality and overall business performance.

feed.title: Welltower stock hits all-time high at 234.15 USD
feed.summary: Welltower Inc.'s stock reached an all-time high of $234.15, reflecting strong investor confidence and positive market sentiment in the healthcare real estate sector. The company also reported strong first-quarter 2026 earnings, with Mizuho raising its price target to $239 and maintaining an Outperform rating. Despite a recent shareholder advisory vote against executive compensation, the company's financial performance and strategic initiatives continue to drive its market success.

feed.title: Avery Dennison Corp highlights labeling solutions as investors track the packaging sector
feed.summary: Avery Dennison Corp is a global company specializing in pressure-sensitive materials and labeling solutions, with a diversified business model spanning label, graphic materials, retail branding, and industrial/medical products. The company focuses on materials science and labeling leadership, with its solutions supporting physical retail with digital information flows. Its stock performance is influenced by packaging demand, consumer spending, industrial activity, and company-specific developments.

feed.title: Albemarle Corp. focuses on lithium growth as demand for electric vehicles expands
feed.summary: Albemarle Corp. is a major lithium and specialty chemicals producer critical for electric vehicle batteries and energy storage systems. The company generates significant revenue from lithium compounds and is involved across the lithium value chain, from extraction to high-purity battery-grade materials. In addition to lithium, Albemarle maintains other specialty chemical businesses that help balance exposure to lithium price cycles.

feed.title: MRNA Stock Surges As Flu Win And CAR-T Hype Ignite Rally
feed.summary: Moderna Inc. (MRNA) stock surged over 7% after its flu shot received unanimous FDA advisory backing and the company revealed significant pipeline progress in oncology and autoimmune disease, including an in vivo CAR-T program. This positive news, especially regarding the diversification beyond COVID-19 and the potential for a new flu franchise, has ignited investor optimism and sharp price movements. While the company's financials still show losses, its strong cash position provides room for continued development, making it a battleground stock for active traders.

feed.title: Cboe files with SEC to launch corporate prediction market-style binary options tied to company KPIs
feed.summary: Cboe Global Markets Inc. has filed a proposal with the SEC to introduce "binary KPI options," which are prediction market-style contracts tied to corporate performance indicators rather than stock prices. If approved, these all-or-nothing options would allow traders to bet on whether a company's specific financial or operating metric will be above or below a predetermined threshold. This initiative expands Cboe's event-driven contract offerings and could allow market participants to take positions on corporate earnings metrics.

feed.title: Terrance Lane Wilson Sells 2,000 Shares of Williams Companies (NYSE:WMB) Stock
feed.summary: Terrance Lane Wilson, SVP of Williams Companies (NYSE:WMB), sold 2,000 shares of the company's stock on July 1st at an average price of $74.16, totaling $148,320. This transaction reduced his holding to 283,159 shares, valued at approximately $21.0 million. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating EPS expectations, and maintains a "Buy" consensus rating from Wall Street with an average price target of $82.94.

feed.title: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) Stock Trades Up, Here Is Why
feed.summary: Shares of Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) rose 2.9% after the company announced plans to launch GPU compute futures contracts with NATIVX, a move into a new high-tech market driven by the demand for computing power in artificial intelligence. This development was well-received by investors and aligns with a positive outlook from analysts, who recently raised their price targets for ICE. Despite a year-to-date decline, the company has seen modest long-term growth for investors.

feed.title: Druva Named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Backup and Data Protection Platforms
feed.summary: Druva has been recognized as a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Backup and Data Protection Platforms for the second consecutive year, based on its Completeness of Vision and Ability to Execute. The company's fully managed SaaS platform, featuring Dru MetaGraph and DruAI, addresses the evolving landscape of data security by integrating AI, identity, and context into backup and recovery workflows. This recognition highlights Druva's commitment to providing robust and intelligent data protection solutions tailored for modern enterprise needs.

feed.title: Minerals Technologies schedules Q2 results call for July 31 after July 30 close
feed.summary: Minerals Technologies (NYSE: MTX) announced it will release its second-quarter 2026 results after market close on Thursday, July 30, 2026. The company will then host a conference call on Friday, July 31, 2026, at 11 a.m. ET to discuss these results. Investors can access the webcast and presentation materials via the MTI investor relations website.

feed.title: Mesabi Trust focuses on iron ore royalties as investors weigh long-term payouts
feed.summary: Mesabi Trust (MSB) operates as a U.S. royalty trust, with its distributions directly tied to iron ore production volumes and prices from Minnesota's Mesabi Iron Range. The trust's financial performance is heavily influenced by North American steel demand, as it provides iron ore pellets for blast furnace operations. Investors prioritize the sustainability of its variable distributions over the long term, rather than short-term trading movements, given its pass-through entity structure.

feed.title: Boeing Stock Surges On Thursday: Here's Why
feed.summary: Boeing (NYSE:BA) stock surged on Thursday, attributed to operational milestones in its defense sector and anticipation of its second-quarter financial release. The company announced its MQ-28 Ghost Bat participated in a multinational exercise, and is set to report Q2 2026 results on July 28, with analysts expecting a 27-cent loss per share on $23.92 billion revenue. This positive movement occurred despite a recent IT outage that affected manufacturing operations.

feed.title: AT&T Internet Security Suite - AT&T Inc. doubles down on bundled protection
feed.summary: AT&T is doubling down on its bundled Internet Security Suite, integrating multi-layer malware and phishing protection from McAfee into select internet and wireless plans at no extra monthly fee. This strategy aims to retain customers and enhance the value of AT&T's connectivity offerings, positioning security as a key component alongside speed and video services. While not a revenue driver on its own, the suite serves as a "sticky" feature to improve customer lifetime value and reduce churn for the telecom giant.

feed.title: REG - Edinburgh Worldwide Bank of America Corp - Holding(s) in Company
feed.summary: Bank of America Corporation has filed an updated notification of major holdings in Edinburgh Worldwide Investment Trust PLC (EWI). The notification indicates that Bank of America's total voting rights in EWI have decreased from 5.062226% to 0.000000% as of June 30, 2026. This change was formally notified to the issuer on July 2, 2026.

feed.title: NatWest Group (NWG) chair and non-executive directors purchase ordinary shares
feed.summary: NatWest Group Plc reported that its Chair, Rick Haythornthwaite, and several non-executive directors purchased ordinary shares on July 1, 2026, in line with the company's shareholding policy. Haythornthwaite acquired 1,842 shares at £6.6780 each, with other independent non-executive directors also buying shares at the same price on the London Stock Exchange. These transactions are detailed in a Form 6-K SEC filing, highlighting insider confidence in the company.

feed.title: Colgate-Palmolive outlines growth priorities as a global consumer staples player
feed.summary: Colgate-Palmolive, a mature consumer goods company, focuses on brand strength, operating margins, cost control, and cash returns to drive growth. The company, known for its oral and home care brands like Colgate toothpaste, operates with a global distribution network that balances growth in mature and emerging markets. Investors constantly monitor the company's ability to maintain brand equity through innovation, manage costs, and navigate competitive landscapes and evolving consumer preferences while providing consistent shareholder returns.

feed.title: Quest Diagnostics steadies after recent volatility as investors focus on core testing business
feed.summary: Quest Diagnostics is navigating recent market volatility by focusing on its core diagnostic services and extensive laboratory network. The company's large scale, diversified revenue base from institutional and individual demand, and ongoing investments in automation and data analytics contribute to its long-term appeal for investors. Strategic partnerships with healthcare providers and the resilient demand for laboratory testing driven by demographic trends and chronic diseases underpin its growth prospects.

feed.title: Rubrik is Named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™
feed.summary: Rubrik has been recognized as a Leader and positioned furthest in Vision in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Backup and Data Protection Platforms for the seventh consecutive year. The company emphasizes its focus on delivering agentic cyber resilience to protect against sophisticated cyber threats and autonomous agent overreach, with CEO Bipul Sinha stating that legacy backup solutions are no longer sufficient. Rubrik aims to narrow the operational recovery gap with a unified platform for data, identity, and autonomous agent governance, including Preemptive Recovery and Identity Resilience solutions.

feed.title: Eli Lilly and Co Stock (LLY) Moved Up by 3.06% on Jul 2: What Signal Does It Send?
feed.summary: Eli Lilly and Co's stock (LLY) surged by 3.06% on July 2, driven by several key developments. These include the launch of a Medicare GLP-1 Bridge program to expand access to Zepbound and Foundayo, the FDA selecting Lilly's Indiana facility for a pilot program to accelerate manufacturing approvals, and European regulators recommending approval for Jaypirca. These strategic advancements and positive market sentiment are fueling investor confidence despite high valuation multiples and industry pricing headwinds.

feed.title: UBS offers autocallable notes linked to Arista Networks (AMUB)
feed.summary: UBS is offering Trigger Autocallable Contingent Yield Notes with Memory Interest linked to Arista Networks (ANET) common stock. These notes have a 20.90% per annum contingent coupon rate and are automatically callable if ANET's closing level meets a 100.00% call threshold. At maturity, principal repayment is contingent and holders face significant loss if ANET's final level falls below 60.00% of the initial level.

feed.title: REG - NatWest Group plc - Director/PDMR Shareholding
feed.summary: NatWest Group plc announced that several Persons Discharging Managerial Responsibility (PDMRs) purchased ordinary shares in the company on July 1, 2026, at a price of £6.6780 per share. This includes Chairman Rick Haythornthwaite, who purchased 1,842 shares, and other independent non-executive directors. The transactions were made in accordance with the company's shareholding policy for the Chairman and Non-executive Directors.

feed.title: Can Seagate's Data Center Business Maintain its Growth Momentum?
feed.summary: Seagate Technology's data center business performed strongly in Q3 fiscal 2026, driven by cloud and enterprise demand, accounting for 80% of total revenue. The company is increasing shipments of its Mozaic HAMR-based drives and expects continued revenue growth and margin expansion through fiscal 2027. Despite high valuation, Seagate holds a Zacks Rank #1 due to positive estimate revisions and strong market performance.

feed.title: Can Salesforce's Data 360 Momentum Drive Stronger FY27 Growth?
feed.summary: Salesforce's Data 360 platform, bolstered by AI initiatives and the Informatica acquisition, is driving significant growth, with combined AI and data annual recurring revenues surging 200% year-over-year in Q1 FY27. The company raised its fiscal 2027 revenue guidance, expecting continued adoption and AI demand to support stronger growth. Despite strong financial momentum, Salesforce's stock has underperformed the industry year-to-date and trades at a lower forward P/E compared to rivals like Microsoft and Oracle in the competitive AI enterprise software market.

feed.title: Kiora Pharmaceuticals to Participate in Piper Sandler Virtual Ophthalmology Symposium
feed.summary: Kiora Pharmaceuticals, Inc. announced its participation in an investor fireside chat at the Piper Sandler Virtual Ophthalmology Symposium on July 9, 2026, at 2:30 p.m. EDT. The presentation will be available live and for replay on Kiora's Investor Relations homepage. Kiora Pharmaceuticals is a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on developing advanced therapies for retinal diseases.

feed.title: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co outlines growth strategy as insurance demand stays resilient
feed.summary: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co is leveraging its strong brokerage and risk management capabilities to meet consistent demand for insurance and employee benefits services. The company's growth strategy is characterized by an acquisition-driven expansion and a stable recurring revenue model. Analysts view their long-term success as dependent on their ability to consistently grow fee income while effectively managing claims, regulatory changes, and competitive pressures.

feed.title: The Southern Company focuses on regulated utility growth amid changing energy policy
feed.summary: The Southern Company, a major U.S. regulated electric and gas utility, is committed to long-term infrastructure investment, grid reliability, and energy transition. Operating under strict regulatory frameworks, the company manages both traditional and lower-emission generation resources while navigating evolving energy policies. Its business model emphasizes a balance between stable, predictable cash flows from regulated operations and the significant capital investments required for modernization and energy transition.

feed.title: MakeMyTrip (MMYT) Group CFO awarded 3,906 RSUs with performance vesting
feed.summary: MakeMyTrip Ltd's Group Chief Financial Officer, Dipak Kumar Bohra, was granted 3,906 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs), with each unit representing one Ordinary Share. These RSUs, totaling 1,953 performance-based units, will vest between April 1, 2027, and April 1, 2030, and are contingent on achieving specific performance conditions. This equity award aims to align the CFO's incentives with the company's long-term performance and shareholder interests.

feed.title: TXN Stock Soars 52% in Three Months: Is There More Upside Ahead?
feed.summary: Texas Instruments (TXN) stock has seen a significant 51.9% rally over the past three months, outperforming its industry and major peers, driven by its essential role in the AI infrastructure boom. The company’s focus on analog and embedded chips for AI data centers, strong financial performance with increasing revenues and earnings, and a strategic shift towards internal manufacturing are key contributors to its growth. Despite a premium valuation, its robust cash generation and shareholder return policies suggest continued upside potential, leading to a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy) rating.

feed.title: Air Products (NYSE: APD) director awarded phantom stock units as deferred pay
feed.summary: Air Products & Chemicals director Wayne Thomas Smith was granted 34.5733 phantom stock units as deferred compensation, increasing his total holdings to 5,217.706 units. These units, valued at $271.35 each, were acquired under the company's Deferred Compensation Program for Directors and will be settled in common stock shares after his board service concludes. This transaction is classified as a grant and not an open-market trade.

feed.title: [144] KLA CORP SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article reports on a Form 144 SEC filing by KLA Corporation (KLAC). The filing indicates a proposed sale of 27,701 shares of common stock with an aggregate market value of $7,359,878.69, acquired through restricted stock vesting. The shares are expected to be sold on July 2, 2026, through Fidelity Brokerage Services LLC on NASDAQ.
